blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 57°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
